name: Zscaler DLP
description: Integrates with Zscaler Internet Access (ZIA) API for DLP policy management, dictionary configuration, incident receiver management, and web DLP rule enforcement

actions.name: List DLP Dictionaries
actions.description: Retrieve all DLP dictionaries including predefined and custom dictionaries used in DLP policies

actions.name: Get DLP Dictionary
actions.description: Retrieve details of a specific DLP dictionary by ID

parameters.name: dictionaryId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the DLP dictionary

actions.name: List DLP Engines
actions.description: Retrieve all DLP engines that combine multiple DLP dictionaries for policy matching

actions.name: List Web DLP Rules
actions.description: Retrieve all Web DLP rules configured for data loss prevention on web traffic

actions.name: Get Web DLP Rule
actions.description: Retrieve details of a specific Web DLP rule

parameters.name: ruleId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the Web DLP rule

actions.name: List DLP Notification Templates
actions.description: Retrieve all DLP notification templates used for incident alerts

actions.name: List DLP Incident Receivers
actions.description: Retrieve all configured DLP incident receiver endpoints

actions.name: List EDM Schemas
actions.description: Retrieve all Exact Data Match (EDM) schemas used for precise data identification
